label: Inflammatory Bowel Disease
comment: Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) refers to a group of lifelong diseases affecting the intestines.

label: Symptom
comment: IBD symptoms can range from mild to severe.

label: Disease Phase
comment: Symptoms come and go in waves.

label: Remission
comment: Periods when symptoms temporarily go away.

label: Complication
comment: IBD can lead to health complications both inside the GI tract and outside the GI tract.

label: Increased Cancer Risk
comment: Increased risk of colon and rectal cancers.

label: Delayed Growth
comment: Delayed or impaired growth in some children.

label: Mental Health Challenge
comment: IBD can impact a person's quality of life, increasing the risk of mental health challenges.

label: Depression
comment: Mental health challenge associated with IBD.

label: Anxiety
comment: Mental health challenge associated with IBD.

label: Distress
comment: Feelings of distress or being overwhelmed.

label: Other Mental Disorder
comment: Other mental disorders associated with IBD.

label: Aminosalicylate
comment: These help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract. Also called 5-aminosalicylic acids or 5-ASA.

label: Corticosteroid
comment: Strong anti-inflammatory steroids that work fast.

label: Immunomodulator
comment: These block the immune reaction that leads to inflammation. Also called immunosuppressive agents.

label: Biologic
comment: These block the immune system chemicals that trigger inflammation. Made from living sources.

label: Surgery
comment: May be done to remove or widen the areas of the intestines that have been severely affected.
